channel.title: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal
channel.description:
I found a error in my console:
*"You have illegal escape sequence in your template literal, most likely inside content's property value."...*
How ca I avoid it?
Thanks !!

item.title: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
It looks like a fix for this bug was released in babel-plugin-emotion@10.0.28:

  • https://github.com/emotion-js/emotion/issues/1755
  • https://github.com/emotion-js/emotion/pull/1761

If you delete your node_modules folder and run npm install again it should install the latest version.

Read full topic
item.source: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal

item.title: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Oops, it looks like a recent bug in the emotion library… emotion-js/emotion#1755

Read full topic
item.source: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal

item.title: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal
item.dc:creator: vscopise
item.description:
I found a error in my console:

“You have illegal escape sequence in your template literal, most likely inside content’s property value.”…

How ca I avoid it?

Thanks !!

item.source: Illegal escape sequence in your template literal
